tools.name: create_shipment
tools.summary: Create a new outbound shipment and buy a shipping label for an order.
tools.description: Generates a shipment with a chosen delivery speed and produces a label. Use when an order needs to actually be shipped to the customer.

tools.name: refund_payment
tools.summary: Return funds from a previously captured payment.
tools.description: Reverses a charge that has already been collected. Use to give money back, never to collect it.

tools.name: create_refund
tools.summary: Refund money back to the original payment method for an order.
tools.description: Issues a cash refund to the card or account the customer originally paid with. Use when the customer is owed money back for a specific order, e.g. a damaged or wrong item.

params.name: order_id
params.description: The order to refund, e.g. A-1042.

params.name: amount_usd
params.description: Amount to refund in US dollars.

params.name: reason
params.description: Why the refund is being issued.

params.name: idempotency_key
params.description: Optional unique key to safely retry the refund.

tools.name: get_shipping_rate
tools.summary: Quote the price of shipping an order at a given speed.
tools.description: Returns an estimated shipping cost without buying a label. Use to price options, not to actually create a shipment.

tools.name: charge_card
tools.summary: Charge a customer's saved card for a given amount right now.
tools.description: Immediately captures a payment on the customer's stored card. Use when money should be collected now, e.g. a subscription renewal.

params.name: amount_usd
params.description: Amount to charge in US dollars.

tools.name: schedule_pickup
tools.summary: Arrange a carrier pickup for shipments that already have labels.
tools.description: Books the carrier to collect packages that already have labels. Use after shipments exist, not to create one.

tools.name: track_shipment
tools.summary: Look up the current tracking status of a shipment.
tools.description: Returns the latest tracking scan and estimated delivery for an existing shipment. Use only when a shipment already exists.

tools.name: escalate_to_billing
tools.summary: Hand a complex billing dispute to a human billing specialist.
tools.description: Creates a case for the billing team to investigate manually. Use for disputes or chargebacks that cannot be resolved with a straightforward refund or credit.

tools.name: transfer_stock
tools.summary: Move stock of a SKU from one warehouse location to another.
tools.description: Relocates existing inventory between locations without changing the total count. Use for internal moves, not for receiving.

tools.name: reset_password
tools.summary: Send a password-reset link so a locked-out user can regain access.
tools.description: Triggers a secure password-reset flow and notifies the user so they can choose a new password. Use when a user is locked out or forgot their password.

params.name: user_id
params.description: The user to reset, e.g. u_88.

params.name: channel
params.description: How to deliver the reset link.

tools.name: schedule_email
tools.summary: Queue an email to be sent automatically at a future time.
tools.description: Schedules a message for delivery at a specified later time. Use only when the user asks to send later, not immediately.

tools.name: grant_admin_role
tools.summary: Give a user administrator privileges.
tools.description: Elevates an account to an admin role with extra permissions. Use only for intentional privilege grants.

tools.name: send_email
tools.summary: Send an email immediately to one or more recipients.
tools.description: Composes and sends an email right away. Use when the user wants a message delivered now, not saved or scheduled for later.

params.name: body
params.description: Optional body text of the email.

tools.name: create_draft
tools.summary: Save an email as a draft without sending it.
tools.description: Stores a composed email in drafts for later editing or sending. Use when the user wants to prepare a message but not send it yet.

tools.name: cancel_shipment
tools.summary: Cancel a shipment and void its label before pickup.
tools.description: Voids an already-created shipping label and cancels the shipment. Use only for shipments that have not yet been picked up.

tools.name: set_reorder_point
tools.summary: Configure the threshold at which a SKU triggers reordering.
tools.description: Sets the low-stock threshold that flags a SKU for reorder. Use to configure policy, not to change the actual count.

tools.name: get_stock_level
tools.summary: Look up the current quantity on hand for a SKU.
tools.description: Returns the recorded inventory count for a SKU. Use to read the level, not to change it.

tools.name: issue_store_credit
tools.summary: Grant store credit to a customer's account instead of a cash refund.
tools.description: Adds a balance of store credit to the customer's account that can be spent on future purchases. Use only when the customer agrees to credit rather than money back on their card.

params.name: reason
params.description: Optional note for why the credit was granted.

tools.name: get_payment_status
tools.summary: Check whether a payment has been captured, pending or failed.
tools.description: Returns the state of an existing payment. Use to look up status, not to move money.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.summary: Create an invoice for the customer to pay later.
tools.description: Generates an unpaid invoice billed to the customer. Use when you want the customer to pay later, not to charge them now.

tools.name: create_purchase_order
tools.summary: Order more units of a SKU from a supplier.
tools.description: Creates a purchase order to buy inventory from a vendor. Use to procure stock you do not yet have, not to record received goods.

params.name: quantity
params.description: Units to order from the supplier.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.summary: Fetch a user's profile and account details.
tools.description: Returns read-only profile information for a user. Use to look up details, not to change anything.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.summary: Cancel an order that has not shipped or been delivered yet.
tools.description: Stops fulfillment and voids an order before it ships. Use only for orders the customer has not yet received; it cannot reverse a completed delivery.

tools.name: deactivate_account
tools.summary: Disable a user's account so they can no longer sign in.
tools.description: Suspends an account and revokes its access. Use to lock someone out on purpose, never to restore access.

tools.name: get_refund_status
tools.summary: Look up the status of a refund that has already been requested.
tools.description: Returns the current state of an existing refund (pending, processing, completed). Use only when a refund already exists and the customer is asking where it is.

params.name: order_id
params.description: The order whose refund to look up.

tools.name: reply_to_thread
tools.summary: Reply within an existing email conversation thread.
tools.description: Posts a reply onto an existing email thread, keeping the conversation history. Use only when responding to a message that already exists.

tools.name: send_sms
tools.summary: Send a text message to a phone number.
tools.description: Delivers a short SMS text to a mobile number. Use for phone texting, not for email delivery.

tools.name: adjust_stock
tools.summary: Increase or decrease the on-hand stock count for a SKU.
tools.description: Applies a delta to the recorded quantity on hand for a SKU. Use to correct or add inventory you physically have, e.g. a received shipment.

params.name: delta
params.description: Change in units; positive to add, negative to remove.

tools.name: update_email
tools.summary: Change the email address on a user's account.
tools.description: Updates the contact email tied to an account. Use when a user wants a different email on file, not when they are locked out.

tools.name: void_invoice
tools.summary: Cancel an unpaid invoice so it no longer needs to be paid.
tools.description: Voids an outstanding invoice. Use only on an invoice that exists and has not been paid.

turns.question: Ship order A-1042 to the customer with 2_day delivery.
Email the Q3 report to finance@acme.com right now.
User u_88 forgot their password and is locked out — send them a reset link by email.
A customer received a damaged item on order A-1042 and wants their 25 USD back on the card they paid with.
Charge the customer's card 49.99 for the subscription renewal of customer c_77.
We just received 50 new units of SKU-991 — add them to stock.
Ship order A-1042 to the customer with 2_day delivery.
Email the Q3 report to finance@acme.com right now.
User u_88 forgot their password and is locked out — send them a reset link by email.
A customer received a damaged item on order A-1042 and wants their 25 USD back on the card they paid with.
